inventory_reconciliation.notes: The biome has suffered a near-total collapse of the registered specimens. Only one leaf of P3 remains.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot. No signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot. No signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining. Shows signs of chlorosis and turgor loss.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot. No signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of eggshell fragments in P3/P4 area. Electronic component (header pin) observed on desk surface near P4.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state showed P3 with a single leaf and P4 with a small sprout.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_current: Progressive loss of the P4 sprout. P3 leaf remains in a state of terminal decline.

visual_health_inference.P3: Terminal decline. The leaf is drooping and lacks structural integrity.

anomalies: Presence of electronic header pins on the desk surface.
Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/top dressing.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decay. The registry-expected plants are largely absent, with only a single, struggling Pothos leaf remaining in P3. The soil appears neglected, and the presence of non-botanical debris (electronics, eggshells) suggests a lack of proper horticultural maintenance. The environment is currently hostile to the remaining specimen.
